competitions.name: June Horse Conformation Show
competitions.description: Showcase your horse or pony's conformation and presence. Open to all breeds and ages. Submit one clear full-body photo.

classes.name: Best Stallion
classes.description: Open to entire males of any breed. Full-body side-on photo, horse standing square.

classes.name: Best Mare
classes.description: Open to mares of any breed and age.

classes.name: Best Gelding
classes.description: Open to geldings of any breed and age.

classes.name: Best Pony (under 148cm)
classes.description: Open to any pony under 148cm, all genders.

competitions.name: June Dog Breed Show
competitions.description: Celebrate your dog's breed standard beauty. All breeds welcome — from tiny Chihuahuas to Great Danes. One high-quality photo per entry.

classes.name: Best Toy Breed
classes.description: Dogs under 5kg. Clear standing photo showing full body.

classes.name: Best Small Breed
classes.description: Dogs 5–10kg. Any breed.

classes.name: Best Medium Breed
classes.description: Dogs 10–25kg. Any breed.

classes.name: Best Large Breed
classes.description: Dogs over 25kg. Any breed.

competitions.name: June Cat Beauty Show
competitions.description: From fluffy Maine Coons to sleek Siamese — show off your cat's unique beauty. All breeds and moggies welcome.

classes.name: Best Longhair Cat
classes.description: Open to all longhaired breeds and mixes.

classes.name: Best Shorthair Cat
classes.description: Open to all shorthaired breeds and mixes.

classes.name: Best Kitten (under 12 months)
classes.description: Open to kittens under 12 months, any breed.

competitions.name: June Small & Exotic Pet Show
competitions.description: Rabbits, guinea pigs, hamsters, birds, reptiles and more — every pet deserves a ribbon! Open to all small and exotic animals.

classes.name: Best Rabbit
classes.description: Any breed or colour of rabbit.

classes.name: Best Guinea Pig
classes.description: Any breed or colour of guinea pig.

classes.name: Best Bird
classes.description: Open to all pet birds — parrots, budgies, canaries and more.

classes.name: Best Exotic / Other Pet
classes.description: Reptiles, rodents, fish, or any other pet not covered above.

competitions.name: June Dog Agility & Action
competitions.description: Show us your dog in motion! Submit a photo capturing your dog's athleticism — jumping, running, fetching, or mid-trick.

classes.name: Best Jump or Agility Shot
classes.description: Dog captured mid-jump or navigating an obstacle.

classes.name: Best Trick Photo
classes.description: Dog performing a trick — sit, roll over, balance, etc.

classes.name: Best Water Action
classes.description: Dog swimming, splashing, or playing in water.

competitions.name: June Horse Colour & Markings Show
competitions.description: Celebrate the stunning variety of equine coat colours and markings. From palominos to appaloosas, every colour has its class.

classes.name: Best Grey or White
classes.description: Open to grey and white horses of any breed.

classes.name: Best Palomino / Cremello / Dun
classes.description: Dilute coat colours in any breed.

classes.name: Best Pinto / Paint / Skewbald / Piebald
classes.description: Two-tone or multi-colour coat patterns.

classes.name: Best Dark Solid (Bay, Black, Brown, Chestnut)
classes.description: Solid dark coat colours, any breed.

competitions.name: June Cutest Pet Show
competitions.description: The most fun show of the season — who is the cutest? Any animal, any age, any breed. Let their personality shine through the photo!

classes.name: Cutest Dog
classes.description: Most adorable dog photo wins. Any breed, any age.

classes.name: Cutest Cat
classes.description: Most adorable cat photo wins. Any breed, any age.

classes.name: Cutest Horse or Pony
classes.description: Most adorable horse or pony photo wins.

classes.name: Cutest Other Animal
classes.description: Any other animal — rabbits, birds, reptiles, farm animals, etc.

competitions.name: June Dog Portrait Show
competitions.description: A show dedicated to the art of dog photography. Close-up portraits, expressive eyes, and character shots. Judge looks for emotion, focus, and composition.

classes.name: Best Puppy Portrait (under 12 months)
classes.description: Close-up portrait of a puppy under 12 months.

classes.name: Best Adult Dog Portrait
classes.description: Close-up or head shot of an adult dog.

classes.name: Best Senior Dog Portrait (7+ years)
classes.description: Portrait of a dog aged 7 or over. Celebrate the grey muzzle!

competitions.name: June Cat Lifestyle Show
competitions.description: Cats in their natural habitat — sleeping, hunting, playing, or just being regal. Lifestyle and candid shots welcome. All breeds and moggies.

classes.name: Cat in Nature / Outdoors
classes.description: Cat photographed outside in a natural setting.

classes.name: Cosy Indoor Cat
classes.description: Cat in a cosy indoor lifestyle setting — sleeping, on windowsill, etc.

classes.name: Cat in Action or Play
classes.description: Cat caught mid-action — jumping, playing, hunting.

competitions.name: June Grand Prix — Best in Show
competitions.description: The ultimate competition of the month. One class, all species — the very best photo from all entries wins the Grand Prix rosette and a €50 prize. Open to all animals.

classes.name: Grand Prix — Best in Show
classes.description: Submit your single best photo of any animal. Judged on overall impact, quality, and presentation. Winner receives the Grand Prix rosette and €50 prize.
